title: Dispatch escalation to supervisor (UI)
description: Golden MES escalation visible in Work Queue.
prompt: On mes-reference, leave a dispatch order pending until it escalates to the supervisor queue, then claim it from Work Queue as supervisor.
humanSteps: Create a dispatch order in mes-reference Operator UI.
Leave it pending past escalation (or trigger escalation path).
Sign in as supervisor (or switch role); open Work Queue and claim the escalated task.
